title: Breaking subscription app spend plateaus at $200K-$1M monthly
insight: Subscription apps stagnate at $200K, $500K, or $1M monthly spend not due to platform limits but systematic creative and structural limitations. Root causes: similar ad formats to same placements, over-consolidated campaigns, app-only funnels that skew young, and ignoring organic multiplier effects. Breakthrough requires four pillars: creative diversity (variety in messaging, video types, styles, lengths, statics, carousels), architecture for scale (split formats and angles), funnel expansion (layer web funnels on app campaigns), and organic amplification (onboarding designed to generate ratings).
raw_excerpt: Stagnating at $200K, $500K, $1M monthly isn't a platform limit, it's a creativity limit. Most subscription apps hit spend walls because they run too similar ad formats to the same placements.
actionable_steps: Audit creative portfolio for true concept diversity vs variations of the same angle
Split campaigns by creative format and messaging angle for unique reach
Add web funnel campaigns to reach older, higher-converting audiences
Design onboarding to generate App Store ratings quickly for organic lift
Track blended CAC including organic rather than just paid metrics

title: Onboarding determines trial conversion, not the paywall
insight: 80% of free trials start on day 0 (same day as install). Trial conversion is decided before the user sees the paywall — it's determined by the onboarding experience. Use onboarding to build purchase intent: nurture the user, entertain them, help them understand their goals. The paywall is just the mechanism; onboarding is the sales process.
raw_excerpt: Your trial conversion is decided before the paywall. 80% of trials start on day 0. Use onboarding to build purchase intent. Nurture, entertain, understand goals.
actionable_steps: Analyze what percentage of trials start on day 0 in your app
Redesign onboarding to build purchase intent before showing the paywall
Include goal-setting, personalization, and value demonstration in onboarding
A/B test onboarding flows with trial CVR as the primary metric
